description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is on the Games page
AND the user has selected the Calendar

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to Sat in a middle row of the calendar
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "<day_of_the_week>, <month>, <day>, <year>, <number_of_games_on_this_day>. Press up, down or left to navigate to more dates."
